## Testing

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm audit --omit=dev`
- [ ] `npm run pack:dry-run`

## Checklist

- [ ] README updated for user-facing changes
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated for notable changes
- [ ] Tool schemas and runtime validation updated together
- [ ] No API keys, tokens, machine-specific paths, or secret config committed
